mapper.select:
SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, SUPPORT_IDX, SUPPORT_STATUS, AREA_CODE, SCHOOL_NAME, SUPPORT_REQ_FIRST, SUPPORT_REQ_SECOND, FIRST_START_DATE, FIRST_END_DATE, SECOND_START_DATE, SECOND_END_DATE, SUPPORT_REQ_DESC, MEMBER_POSITION, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_KEY, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PHONE, MEMBER_CELL_PHONE, TOTAL_BOOK_COUNT, PROGRAM_NAME, PERCENT, PARENT_COUNT, STAFF_COUNT, MANAGER_COUNT, MANAGER_TYPE, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, DELETE_YN FROM SCHOOL_SUPPORT WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY SUPPORT_DATE

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, SUPPORT_IDX, SUPPORT_STATUS, AREA_CODE, SCHOOL_NAME, SUPPORT_REQ_FIRST, SUPPORT_REQ_SECOND, FIRST_START_DATE, FIRST_END_DATE, SECOND_START_DATE, SECOND_END_DATE, SUPPORT_REQ_DESC, MEMBER_POSITION, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_KEY, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PHONE, MEMBER_CELL_PHONE, TOTAL_BOOK_COUNT, PROGRAM_NAME, PERCENT, PARENT_COUNT, STAFF_COUNT, MANAGER_COUNT, MANAGER_TYPE, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, DELETE_YN FROM SCHOOL_SUPPORT WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND SUPPORT_STATUS IN ('1', '2', '3') AND (FIRST_START_DATE like #{support_year}||'%' OR FIRST_END_DATE like #{support_year}||'%' OR SECOND_START_DATE like #{support_year}||'%' OR SECOND_END_DATE like #{support_year}||'%')
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY FIRST_START_DATE

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SCHOOL_SUPPORT WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND SUPPORT_STATUS = #{support_status} AND (FIRST_START_DATE like #{plan_date}||'%' OR FIRST_END_DATE like #{plan_date}||'%' OR SECOND_START_DATE like #{plan_date}||'%' OR SECOND_END_DATE like #{plan_date}||'%')
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY ADD_DATE

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, SUPPORT_IDX, SUPPORT_STATUS, AREA_CODE, SCHOOL_NAME, SUPPORT_REQ_FIRST, SUPPORT_REQ_SECOND, FIRST_START_DATE, FIRST_END_DATE, SECOND_START_DATE, SECOND_END_DATE, SUPPORT_REQ_DESC, MEMBER_POSITION, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_KEY, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PHONE, MEMBER_CELL_PHONE, TOTAL_BOOK_COUNT, PROGRAM_NAME, PERCENT, PARENT_COUNT, STAFF_COUNT, MANAGER_COUNT, MANAGER_TYPE, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, DELETE_YN FROM SCHOOL_SUPPORT WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND SUPPORT_IDX = #{support_idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(SUPPORT_IDX),0)+1 FROM SCHOOL_SUPPORT WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id}
INSERT INTO SCHOOL_SUPPORT ( HOMEPAGE_ID, SUPPORT_IDX, SUPPORT_STATUS, AREA_CODE, SCHOOL_NAME, SUPPORT_REQ_FIRST, SUPPORT_REQ_SECOND, FIRST_START_DATE, FIRST_END_DATE, SECOND_START_DATE, SECOND_END_DATE, SUPPORT_REQ_DESC, MEMBER_POSITION, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_KEY, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PHONE, MEMBER_CELL_PHONE, TOTAL_BOOK_COUNT, PROGRAM_NAME, PERCENT, PARENT_COUNT, STAFF_COUNT, MANAGER_COUNT, MANAGER_TYPE, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, DELETE_YN ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{support_idx}, #{support_status}, #{area_code}, #{school_name}, #{support_req_first}, #{support_req_second}, #{first_start_date}, #{first_end_date}, #{second_start_date}, #{second_end_date}, #{support_req_desc}, #{member_position}, #{member_id}, #{member_key}, #{member_name}, #{member_phone}, #{member_cell_phone}, #{total_book_count}, #{program_name}, #{percent}, #{parent_count}, #{staff_count}, #{manager_count}, #{manager_type}, SYSDATE, #{add_id}, SYSDATE, #{mod_id}, 'N' )
mapper.delete: UPDATE SCHOOL_SUPPORT SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND SUPPORT_IDX = #{support_idx}
mapper.select:
SELECT MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 1, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as SUN, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 2, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as MON, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 3, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as TUE, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 4, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as WED, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 5, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as THU, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 6, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as FRI, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 7, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as SAT FROM ( SELECT (A.BASE_MON + ROWNUM -1) AS days, A.BASE_MON, ((TRUNC(BASE_MON + ROWNUM - 1, 'D') - TRUNC(TRUNC(BASE_MON + ROWNUM - 1, 'Y'), 'D')) / 7 + 1) AS WEEK_NUM FROM (SELECT TO_DATE (#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM') BASE_MON FROM DUAL) A, DICTIONARY B ) C
WHERE C.DAYS <= LAST_DAY(BASE_MON) GROUP BY WEEK_NUM ORDER BY WEEK_NUM

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, SUPPORT_IDX, SUPPORT_STATUS, AREA_CODE, SCHOOL_NAME, SUPPORT_REQ_FIRST, SUPPORT_REQ_SECOND, FIRST_START_DATE, FIRST_END_DATE, SECOND_START_DATE, SECOND_END_DATE, SUPPORT_REQ_DESC, MEMBER_POSITION, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_KEY, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PHONE, MEMBER_CELL_PHONE, TOTAL_BOOK_COUNT, PROGRAM_NAME, PERCENT, PARENT_COUNT, STAFF_COUNT, MANAGER_COUNT, MANAGER_TYPE, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, DELETE_YN FROM SCHOOL_SUPPORT WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND SUPPORT_STATUS IN ('1', '2', '3') AND (FIRST_START_DATE like #{support_year}||'%' OR FIRST_END_DATE like #{support_year}||'%' OR SECOND_START_DATE like #{support_year}||'%' OR SECOND_END_DATE like #{support_year}||'%')
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY FIRST_START_DATE
